Event Description: Join us for an unforgettable musical adventure about love, family, and finding where you belong! Join Shine Theatre Company for an unforgettable adventure filled with soaring vocals, wild dance numbers, and a story about love, family, and finding where you belong. With music by Phil Collins and a story full of adventure, heart, and high-energy fun, this show is packed with musical excitement that only live theatre can provide. We can’t wait to see you in the jungle!
